query: Quick heads up I am rinsing off and do not want to step straight into bright light so pull blinds 1 in living room to 85.0 percent closed 5 minutes from now and 21 minutes after the previous action move it to 65.0 percent closed. Also I am drying off and want the bathroom ready for evening prep so switch on dimmer light 1 in bathroom to power on and level 100 30 minutes from now and 14 minutes after the previous action reduce it to power on and level 90

steps.thought: I need to verify the device IDs for the blinds in the living room and the dimmer light in the bathroom, and understand their control clusters before scheduling the actions.
I need to find the device ID for the blinds in the living room.
I need to find the device ID for the dimmer light in the bathroom.
I need to understand the clusters and commands/attributes for the window covering controller to set the position correctly.
I need to check the structure of the dimmable light to know the correct cluster and command/attribute for setting brightness and power state.
I will schedule the first action: pull blinds to 85% closed at 14:08:01.
I will schedule the second action: move blinds to 65% closed at 14:29:01 (21 minutes after the first action).
I will schedule the first light action: turn on and set level to 100 at 14:33:01.
I will schedule the final action: reduce light to level 90 at 14:47:01.
All actions have been successfully scheduled according to the user's timeline. I will now provide the final confirmation.

action_input.answer: I have scheduled all your requests: the living room blinds will be pulled to 85% closed in 5 minutes, and then to 65% closed 21 minutes later. The bathroom dimmer light will turn on to level 100 in 30 minutes, and then reduce to level 90 14 minutes after that.
